title: UROUTER_SET
text: UROUTER_SET Change settings for the Uniface Router. operation UROUTER_SET params numeric Maxclients : IN ; (I2) numeric Maxservers : IN ; (I2) numeric Maxmons : IN ; (I2) numeric IOPrint : IN ; (I4) string Message : IN ; (C80) endparams Parameters Maxclients —maximum clients allowed Maxservers —maximum servers allowed Maxmons —maximum monitors allowed IOPrint — $IOPRINT for the Uniface Router Message —message that is displayed in all running monitors and returned to new clients or monitors that are refused connections. Return Values If successful, $status is set to 0. Otherwise, see the "Return Codes" section in UROUTMON . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The privileged-user operation UROUTER_SET sets certain parameters for the Uniface Router dynamically. You can limit or disallow the number of clients, servers, and monitors, and set the $IOPRINT value for the Uniface Router. For all maximum limits, the value -2 means no change, and -1 means unlimited. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
